hero.headline: Oral health connected to the whole
hero.subheadline: Your mouth reveals what your body needs — and I listen.

manifesto.title: The philosophy
manifesto.text: Your mouth reveals what your body is asking for — and I listen.
manifesto.description: In integrative dentistry, every oral symptom is a clue about the health of the entire body. We don't just treat teeth — we investigate causes, connect signals, and build a path of care that respects who you are.
manifesto.cta: I want to learn about this approach

about.title: Who listens
about.subtitle: Dra. Marcella Melro
about.description: Dental surgeon with a degree from UNESP and specialization in integrative dentistry. Over more than a decade of practice, I developed an approach that connects oral health to the whole body — integrating dentistry, medicine, nutrition, and psychology.
about.philosophy: Each patient is a unique organism. My role is not just to treat what appears — it is to listen to what the mouth is revealing about overall health.
about.credentials: CRO-SC • UNESP • Member of ABM Funcional Integrativa
about.quote: I don't treat teeth. I listen to what they're saying.

services.title: The care
services.subtitle: Each service is an integrative look at your health

avaliacao.name: Integrative Assessment
avaliacao.description: A comprehensive consultation where we listen to what your mouth is revealing about your body. Detailed anamnesis connecting oral health, metabolism, and lifestyle habits.

radiografia.name: Diagnostic Panoramic X-ray
radiografia.description: Panoramic X-rays go far beyond the teeth. They allow us to see the body as a whole, identifying signs that other exams don't reveal.

periodontal.name: Systemic Periodontal Treatment
periodontal.description: Healthy gums don't bleed. We treat periodontal disease by investigating systemic causes — inflammation, nutrition, metabolism — not just local symptoms.

harmonizacao.name: Orofacial Harmonization
harmonizacao.description: Balance and naturalness. Procedures that respect facial harmony, without excess, with an integrative look at health as a whole.

odontopediatria.name: Integrative Pediatric Dentistry
odontopediatria.description: Welcoming care for little ones, from birth. Guidance for parents on nutrition, breathing, and habits that build oral health for life.

preventivo.name: Preventive Care
preventivo.description: Individualized prevention focused on maintaining the body's balance. Regular cleanings, nutritional guidance, and continuous monitoring.

services.cta: Discover how I can help you

impact.phrase: The smile is the gateway to the health of the entire body

instagram.subtitle: Follow the practice and integrative approach on Instagram

contact.subtitle: Ready to start your integrative health journey?
